text: ArcReach completely transformed our outbound pipeline. We went from manually sourcing 50 leads a week to 2,000 enriched, personalized touchpoints. Our pipeline tripled in 60 days.
author: James Park

text: ArcDesk handles 89% of our support tickets autonomously. Our team went from firefighting to strategy. CSAT went up, costs went down. It's the most impactful thing we've done in two years.
author: Sarah Chen

text: Client onboarding used to take two weeks and three ops team members. With ArcBoard, new clients are fully activated in under four hours. The compliance accuracy alone justifies the entire investment.
author: Michael Torres

text: ArcPulse caught a major churn risk we had no idea existed — 30 days before the client was going to cancel. The retention play it triggered saved us a $240K account. The ROI was immediate.
author: Priya Nair

text: ArcQual routes our inbound leads faster and more accurately than any human process we've tried. Our reps only talk to qualified buyers now. Conversion rates are up 58% quarter over quarter.
author: David Kim

text: We deployed ArcAgent across all five agents in under three weeks. The integration with our existing Salesforce stack was seamless. It felt like we added an entire revenue operations team overnight.
author: Amara Johnson

text: The before/after on cost per ticket is staggering. We were at $280 per ticket. ArcDesk brought us to $43. For a company handling 50,000 tickets a month, that's not a line item — it's a business model change.
author: Ryan Okafor

text: ArcPulse gives my CS team superpowers. Every morning they log in knowing exactly which accounts need attention, what the risk is, and what to say. It's like having a data scientist on every call.
author: Lisa Fernandez

text: The interactive dashboard on each agent page sold us before the demo. We could see ArcBoard working in real time — the team understood immediately what they were getting. No leap of faith required.
author: Tom Walters

text: ArcReach's personalization quality is unlike anything we've seen. Every email references something specific and relevant. Our prospects reply asking if a human wrote it. That's the bar we needed to hit.
author: Nadia Osei
